name: almondoo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace published by almondoo.

plugins.name: configure-github-permissions
plugins.description: Interactively configure GitHub CLI (gh) permissions in .claude/settings.local.json via 10 categories × 3 choices (allow / ask / deny). Destructive categories (merge, release, workflow exec, gh api) default to deny.

plugins.name: parallel-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent parallel audit of agent-instruction markdown files (CLAUDE.md / CLAUDE.local.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md / SKILL.md) for HIGH-severity quality issues. Dispatches N independent subagents (default 3), keeps only findings flagged by at least threshold (default 2), classifies redundancy, then proposes targeted fixes with per-fix user approval. Event-driven diagnostic for post-refactor verification, ignored / drifted rules, or pre-shipping checks — not for routine maintenance.
